// docs: Example cbom.config.json. CLI flags override these; this overrides built-in defaults.

rules.// per-algorithm tuning: Tune one algorithm without disabling the whole rule.
rules.// auditable waiver: Disabling a rule is a recorded waiver. Under the 'audit' profile it annotates instead of suppressing; an expired waiver re-activates the finding.

CBOM0050.waiverJustification: System.Random used only for non-security jitter; reviewed.

// data sensitivity: Long-lived confidentiality protected by quantum-vulnerable crypto is the top HNDL priority. Match by path glob, or by namespace with an 'ns:' key.
